channel.title: Frontity and WordPress
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
Hi there
I'm wondering what the best way to build with WordPress and Frontity is. I have a band music website and plan to convert it to react, but the problem is the server I have (digital ocean vps droplet) doesn't seem to work with WordPress and React as a theme template. I'm a bit new with Frontity/React but have worked with it a bit.
Any ideas on the best way? Is it best to leave WordPress out or can I attach it as a Wordpress theme would, but it's a react theme?

item.title: Frontity and WordPress
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Hi @meggsp, my colleague can help you with the server related issue, he is an expert in this field.

His contact details are here

Skype - abhijeetmandal007@hotmail.com
Email id - abhijeetmandal2502@gmail.com

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity and WordPress
item.dc:creator: meggsp
item.description:
Hi there

I’m wondering what the best way to build with WordPress and Frontity is. I have a band music website and plan to convert it to react, but the problem is the server I have (digital ocean vps droplet) doesn’t seem to work with WordPress and React as a theme template. I’m a bit new with Frontity/React but have worked with it a bit.

Any ideas on the best way? Is it best to leave WordPress out or can I attach it as a Wordpress theme would, but it’s a react theme?

Read full topic
